preflight.note: This item was recorded before implementation began, dogfooding the very rule it makes mandatory.

acceptance_criteria.text: Preflight is enabled by default (absent config requires a marker for every work item); existing repos grandfather their pre-2.0 items via required_from_id / required_from_date.
`repopact new` stamps the preflight marker and concrete provenance; RepoPact's own owners.json grandfathers 000-022 via required_from_id 23.
adopt and doctor set required_from_date to the adoption/upgrade date so existing adopters are grandfathered on upgrade; tests cover default-on and the grandfather thresholds.
